query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.onboardingStage, uo.completed, uo.currentStep, s.id as serviceId, s.name as serviceName FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_onboarding uo ON uo.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN services s ON s.userId = u.id WHERE u.email LIKE '%zapreviewer%' OR u.email LIKE '%mailinator%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT u.id, u.email, u.onboardingStage, uo.completed, uo.currentStep, s.id as serviceId, s.name as serviceName FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_onboarding uo ON uo.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN services s ON s.userId = u.id WHERE u.email LIKE '%zapreviewer%' OR u.email LIKE '%mailinator%';
